fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the line.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the location of the internal pick line.

fields.name: Shelf No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the shelf number of the item for informational use.

fields.name: To Bin Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the bin into which the items should be placed when they are picked.

fields.name: To Zone Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the To Zone Code of the zone where items should be placed once they are picked.

fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item that should be picked.

fields.name: Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity that should be picked.

fields.name: Qty. (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity that should be picked, in the base unit of measure.

fields.name: Qty. Outstanding
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity that still needs to be handled.

fields.name: Qty. Outstanding (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity that still needs to be handled, in the base unit of measure.

fields.name: Qty. Picked
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of the line that is registered as picked.

fields.name: Qty. Picked (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of the line that is registered as picked, in the base unit of measure.

fields.name: Pick Qty.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of the item in pick instructions that are assigned to be picked for the line.

fields.name: Pick Qty. (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of the item in pick instructions assigned to be picked for the line, in the base unit of measure.

fields.name: Unit of Measure Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies how each unit of the item or resource is measured, such as in pieces or hours. By default, the value in the Base Unit of Measure field on the item or resource card is inserted.

fields.name: Qty. per Unit of Measure
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of base units of measure, that are in the unit of measure, specified for the item on the line.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the item in the line.

fields.name: Description 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies a second description of the item on the line.

fields.name: Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the status is Blank, Partially Picked, or Completely Picked.

fields.name: Sorting Sequence No.
fields.tooltip: This field is used internally. This determine the order in which lines are displayed.

fields.name: Due Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the warehouse activity must be completed.

fields.name: Cubage
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cubage of the items on the line, calculated as quantity. Outstanding x Item Unit of Measure Cubage.

fields.name: Weight
fields.tooltip: Specifies the weight of the items on the line, calculated as Qty. Outstanding x Item Unit of Measure Weight.
